ops.title: daemonkit decision: synckitd retired, per-app agents
ops.body:
**Decision (user, 2026-07-17):** synckitd (synckit's manifest-driven daemon supervisor) is deleted, not migrated. launchd is the per-app supervisor; synckitd coupled every consumer to its release train. cookiesync and reposync each get their own `service.Agent` LaunchAgent, written as if per-app agents were always the model — zero migration code in any repo. The manifest demotes to install metadata.

**Host migration is manual:** our 2 live hosts move via a bash/ssh runbook (cc-notes runbook, Track S): inventory labels/sockets + TCC surface → install replacement bundles/agents without starting conflicting listeners → stop/bootout the synckitd supervisor FIRST → start per-app agents → verify peer version/identity (not mere reachability) + trust + domain function → remove old plist/binary. Socket-squatter recovery: keep the supervisor stopped, locate peer via socket, revalidate {pid, start_time}, terminate, retry.

In-process child supervision survives as daemonkit `supervise` (generalized cc-orchestrate supervisor.go), not as a synckitd replacement.
